employment.description: Labor market indicators, unemployment, payrolls, participation

financial_stress.description: Volatility indices, credit spreads, financial conditions

gdp_growth.description: Real GDP, GDP components, growth rates

housing.description: Home prices, mortgage rates, housing starts

inflation.description: Consumer and producer price indices, CPI components, alternative measures

jolts.description: Job openings, quits, hires, separations, layoffs

labor_productivity.description: Output per hour, unit labor costs, multifactor productivity

money_banking.description: Money supply, bank reserves, deposits, lending

trade.description: Import/export prices, exchange rates, trade balances

heterodox.description: Heterodox real-competition (Shaikh) interpretive layer: labor share, profit share/markups, economy-wide profit rate, productive/unproductive labor. Constructed/labeled interpretation; underlying data is BEA/BLS/FRED.

CUURA422SA0.name: CPI All Items - San Francisco Metro

FRBATLWGT12MMUMHWGJSW.name: Atlanta Fed Wage Growth Tracker (Job Switcher)

LNS12032196.name: PT for Econ Reasons - Could Only Find PT Work

LNS13023653.name: Unemployment Level - Job Losers on Layoff

LNS13026511.name: Job Losers Not on Layoff as % of Total Unemployed

MEXTOT.name: Import Price: All Industries from Mexico

NILFWJN.name: Not in Labor Force Want a Job Now

PCU9241269241261.name: PPI Private Passenger Auto Insurance Premiums

PPIFIS.name: PPI Finished Goods Less Food & Energy

W270RE1A156NBEA.name: Labor Share of Gross Domestic Income

WPSFD49502.name: PPI Finished Consumer Goods Less Food

PRS85006173.name: Nonfarm Business Sector: Labor Share (index, 2017=100), annual mean
PRS85006173.formula: annual mean of quarterly FRED PRS85006173

STAR_LABOR_SHARE_CORP_BEA.name: Corporate-business labor share (BEA-native)
STAR_LABOR_SHARE_CORP_BEA.formula: 100 * T1.14 line 4 (Compensation of employees, corporate) / line 1 (Gross value added, corporate)

STAR_PROFIT_SHARE_NFC.name: Nonfinancial corporate profit share / markup proxy
STAR_PROFIT_SHARE_NFC.formula: 100 * T1.14 line 27 (NFC corporate profits w/ IVA+CCAdj) / line 17 (NFC gross value added)

STAR_PROFIT_SHARE_CORP.name: Total corporate profit share (secondary)
STAR_PROFIT_SHARE_CORP.formula: 100 * T1.14 line 11 (total corporate profits w/ IVA+CCAdj) / line 1 (corporate gross value added)

STAR_PROFIT_RATE.name: Economy-wide profit rate (corporate profits / private net capital stock)
STAR_PROFIT_RATE.source: BEA NIPA T1.14 + BEA Fixed Assets 3.1ESI
STAR_PROFIT_RATE.formula: 100 * T1.14 line 11 (total corporate profits w/ IVA+CCAdj) / FAAt301ESI line 1 (current-cost net stock of private fixed assets)

STAR_PROFIT_RATE_NFC.name: Sector-matched NFC profit rate (NOT constructed)
STAR_PROFIT_RATE_NFC.formula: NFC profits (line 27) / NFC net fixed assets — data_unavailable: no sector-matched NFC net capital stock on disk (FAAt tables are by-industry NAICS, not by sector/legal form)

STAR_PRODUCTIVE_LABOR_SHARE.name: Productive labor share of employment (Shaikh-Tonak classification)
STAR_PRODUCTIVE_LABOR_SHARE.units: percent of total nonfarm payroll employment
STAR_PRODUCTIVE_LABOR_SHARE.formula: 100 * (USMINE + USCONS + MANEMP + (USTPU - USTRADE - USWTRADE)) / PAYEMS, annual mean of monthly CES employment
STAR_PRODUCTIVE_LABOR_SHARE.classification_note: CONSTRUCTED CLASSIFICATION - heterodox (Shaikh-Tonak), NOT an official BLS series. Productive = mining, construction, manufacturing, and the transport/warehousing/utilities part of CES Trade-Transportation-Utilities. Judgment calls: Information and Professional & Business Services assigned unproductive; agriculture excluded (not in CES nonfarm). See PRODUCTIVE_UNPRODUCTIVE_DPR_EPR.md.

STAR_UNPRODUCTIVE_LABOR_SHARE.name: Unproductive labor share of employment (Shaikh-Tonak classification)
STAR_UNPRODUCTIVE_LABOR_SHARE.units: percent of total nonfarm payroll employment
STAR_UNPRODUCTIVE_LABOR_SHARE.formula: 100 * (USWTRADE + USTRADE + USFIRE + USPBS + USEHS + USLAH + USSERV + USINFO + CES9091000001 + CES9092000001 + CES9093000001) / PAYEMS, annual mean of monthly CES employment
STAR_UNPRODUCTIVE_LABOR_SHARE.classification_note: CONSTRUCTED CLASSIFICATION - heterodox (Shaikh-Tonak), NOT an official BLS series. Unproductive = wholesale+retail trade, FIRE, professional & business services, education & health, leisure & hospitality, other services, information, and all government. See PRODUCTIVE_UNPRODUCTIVE_DPR_EPR.md.

STAR_PRODUCTIVE_EMP.name: Productive labor employment (Shaikh-Tonak classification)
STAR_PRODUCTIVE_EMP.formula: USMINE + USCONS + MANEMP + (USTPU - USTRADE - USWTRADE), annual mean of monthly CES employment (thousands)
STAR_PRODUCTIVE_EMP.classification_note: CONSTRUCTED CLASSIFICATION - heterodox (Shaikh-Tonak), NOT an official BLS series. See PRODUCTIVE_UNPRODUCTIVE_DPR_EPR.md.

STAR_UNPRODUCTIVE_EMP.name: Unproductive labor employment (Shaikh-Tonak classification)
STAR_UNPRODUCTIVE_EMP.formula: USWTRADE + USTRADE + USFIRE + USPBS + USEHS + USLAH + USSERV + USINFO + CES9091000001 + CES9092000001 + CES9093000001, annual mean of monthly CES employment (thousands)
STAR_UNPRODUCTIVE_EMP.classification_note: CONSTRUCTED CLASSIFICATION - heterodox (Shaikh-Tonak), NOT an official BLS series. See PRODUCTIVE_UNPRODUCTIVE_DPR_EPR.md.

STAR_VU_RATIO.name: Vacancy-to-Unemployment Ratio (V/U)
STAR_VU_RATIO.formula: JTSJOL (job openings, thousands) / UNEMPLOY (unemployment level, thousands)

STAR_REAL_AHE_YOY.name: Real Average Hourly Earnings, YoY
STAR_REAL_AHE_YOY.formula: YoY of (CES0500000003 avg hourly earnings / CPIAUCSL * 100)

heterodox_integration.note: Phase 2 StarCruiser publish build — SITE_SPEC charts 12-15.
